chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1501 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 28.11.2023 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Bakhat Hussain Sarwari, Focal Person of District Education Officer (Primary), Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has filed comments of respondent No.4, and submits that case of the petitioner for appointment as Naib Qasid on deceased quota has been processed, and as soon as the process is completed and approval is granted, the petitioner would be given offer order. In the light of such statement, Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. However, the compliance report shall be submitted for a perusal in chamber after two months. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
